About Treetop

Built by someone who
does the work.

Treetop Growth Strategy is a boutique AI implementation consultancy. We don't train. We implement. We build Claude workflows inside your business and prove they work before we leave.

Bill Colbert · Founder

20 years building
revenue systems.

I've spent two decades in B2B sales, marketing, and revenue operations — building the systems that make businesses grow. I've run fractional CMO engagements, built AI-native GTM architectures, and helped companies from early-stage startups to $50M+ businesses find the system behind their growth.

Claude changed what's possible for small businesses. I saw it firsthand — the hours my own team reclaimed, the quality of work that came out, the things we could now do that used to require a bigger team. Treetop's Claude implementation practice exists because every small business deserves access to that leverage.

I implement Claude the way I'd want it done for my own business: real workflows, trained team, measured results.

20+ Years
Revenue operations, GTM strategy, and AI implementation across B2B services.
Treetop Growth Strategy
Founded to give small businesses the AI leverage that was previously only accessible to enterprise.
Claude Early Adopter
Implementing Claude since early access — we know what works and what's hype.
Austin, TX
Serving clients across the US remotely, with occasional on-site engagements for larger teams.
Our approach

We don't hand you
a prompt sheet.

Implementation, not training.

Trainers teach you what's possible. We build what's possible. There's a significant difference between knowing Claude can help and having Claude actually integrated into your daily workflows — doing real work, producing real output, saving real hours.

Measured outcomes, not vibes.

Every engagement starts with baselines and ends with data. Hours saved. Output volume. Quality metrics. You know exactly what the investment returned — not because we say so, but because you can see it in the numbers.

Your business, not a template.

We configure Claude with your brand voice, your product knowledge, your SOPs. The output sounds like you — not a generic AI that could belong to any company. Every system we build is specific to how your business actually operates.

Work with Treetop

Three ways to get started.

AI Readiness Audit
A structured assessment of your business's current workflows and where Claude can generate the most leverage.
Starting at $500
Read more →
Claude Implementation
Full-service implementation of Claude workflows inside your business — configured, trained, and measured.
Starting at $2,500
Read more →
Ongoing Retainer
Continuous optimization, new workflow builds, and strategic guidance as your business evolves.
Starting at $1,500/mo
Read more →

Let's talk about
your business.
